name: Design Proposal

---

## Summary

Briefly describe the proposed design change.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed?

## Affected Areas

- [ ] Product scope
- [ ] CLI conventions
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Feature specification
- [ ] Testing strategy
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Proposal

Describe the expected behavior, architecture, or policy.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe other options and why they are less suitable.

## Acceptance Criteria

How will reviewers know this design is ready?
